# opnsense_firewall_nat_one_to_one (Resource)

Manages a one-to-one (1:1) NAT rule on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `external` (String) External (public) IP address.
- `interface` (String) Interface this rule applies to.
- `source_net` (String) Internal source network/host.

### Optional

- `categories` (Set of String) Firewall category UUIDs.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `destination_net` (String) Destination network/host.
- `destination_not` (Boolean) Invert the destination match.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this rule is enabled.
- `log` (Boolean) Log packets matched by this rule.
- `nat_reflection` (String) NAT reflection mode (default, enable, disable).
- `sequence` (Number) Rule evaluation order.
- `source_not` (Boolean) Invert the source match.
- `type` (String) NAT type: binat or nat (defaults to binat).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
